title: Californication
why_this_song: Californication by Red Hot Chili Peppers (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "It's Californication"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "And little girls from Sweden dream of silver-screen quotation"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "It's Californication"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "It's the edge of the world, end all of western civilization"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Pay your surgeon very well to break the spell of aging"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "californication" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "californication" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dream" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dream" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Californication" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Californication" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
